title: Miyamura Interview
wikitext:
[]: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Mr. M » Sat Mar 20, 2021 7:24 am Some days ago I've seen an interview to the seiyuu of Asuka were she wasn't that happy with the character's choices in 3.0+1.0 been posted here in the spoiler thread,bit I lost it. Can someone help me and post it here?

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Sat Mar 20, 2021 7:50 am Mr.M i think this is the link you are looking for https://ha-navi.com/ken-ken It was me who put it in the other thread, I think you can't find it anymore because it is now located on the page too far behind the last pages of the Leak Thread

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 20, 2021 5:44 pm waaay to do one of those "misleading titles" here. The actual quote is that she "feels sorry" for the bad stuff Asuka had to go through in the series . Not the Kensuke thing, though she says she's surprised about it since there was no buildup (but that is precisely the point - 14 years passed.) Still, between this & the alt life action scene Asuka has now officially ended up with every single member of the Baka trio in one alternate universe (if you count Angelic days) I hope a translation of the full staff interviews happen soon, especially the Gendo and Rei ones.

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Xenoblade » Sat Mar 20, 2021 5:56 pm Looking forward to a translation as well! Kendrix wrote: The actual quote is that she "feels sorry" for the bad stuff Asuka had to go through in the series . Not the Kensuke thing, though she says she's surprised about it since there was no buildup (but that is precisely the point - 14 years passed.)

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Mar 20, 2021 5:59 pm Xenoblade wrote: Ehhh...even 14 years later you can't tell us Kensuke turns out to be a cool dude without raising eyebrows. The guy's introduction to her in the NGE timeline is taking creepy photos and objectifying her.

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Sat Mar 20, 2021 6:03 pm Kendrix wrote: Still, between this & the alt life action scene Asuka has now officially ended up with every single member of the Baka trio in one alternate universe (if you count Angelic days)

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 20, 2021 6:12 pm They were pics of her in public - there#s maybe one that could've been a private place depending from where it was shot (the one that#s possibly in a locker room) but there's no point in affixing loaded labels to someone so young & not fully formed, at a time where much of society in general wouldn't take this seriously; What this calls for is an adult stepping in n explaining why it's not funny & a serious problem. Kids don't automatically know that, or any morals, we're all born as ugly monkeys. Besides that bit not being in Rebuild at all, (probably because society marched on and the makers themselves would've got that it's not funny by now) 14 years passed. Whatever his hobbies, Kensuke was always consistently the insightful & understanding one: - He gets Shinji to defrost in ep 4, expertly disarming his defenses - He explains to Shinji that Misato letting him see her casual side - He makes that in--depht observation on Rei in ep 14 He drops the ball in ep 19 with a tactless remark but who doesn't at some point in this show? In Rebuild specifically he gets a scene encouraging Touji to let go of his old-fashioned ideas re dudes cooking, and in both continuities he encourages Touji to get over himself re: Shinji. The whole point is that time passed & people changed, & when that happens ppl end up doing things you'd never imagined them doing before. (which would still be the case if they're simply friends) So in that sense the point is not arguing that they're a great ship or whatever but to show that time passed. (much like in he alt live-action scene she's boinking Touji to show that she has enough relationship issues of her own & would have problems even without Shinji there) I'm also really waiting for the one from Mari's VA to finally confirm or deny some things re her past connections. So far I already heard someone on twitter mentioning a snippet about how "Mari is the type to push others towards their happiness"

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Sat Mar 20, 2021 6:30 pm Kendrix wrote: The whole point is that time passed & people changed, & when that happens ppl end up doing things you'd never imagined them doing before. (which would still be the case if they're simply friends) So in that sense the point is not arguing that they're a great ship or whatever but to show that time passed.

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 20, 2021 7:33 pm there's probably some deliberate degree of Deliberately Up To Interpretation here (which is why it seems just pointlesssly reductive & unproductive to argue about the One Truth), though let's not act like they didn't calculate what ppl might think and that it's all just "stupid people reading into it" It's worth noting that he's still got her on last name basis supposedly which isn't unusual for a boyfriend (see Misato & Kaji) but seems weird for a family-type connection (see Misato & the children)

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Mar 20, 2021 8:33 pm At least two of our guys are working on it. Be patient. Also, she has just said this: FelipeFritschF wrote: Mr. Tines#916779 wrote: The word being used in respect of this is "ファザコン", which we would normally call an Elektra Complex ("Who's the Daddy?")

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 20, 2021 8:47 pm thread/20641/Shin-Eva-leak-general/1060/#p913926 <- There's actually a smoother translation in the main spoiler thread

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by KitchenBattle » Sun Mar 21, 2021 1:38 am In Miyamura's pamphlet interview, she leans towards the implications of Asuka x Kensuke shipping, but then in the most recent interview that's posted on the main discussion thread with audio, she is saying that Kensuke is more a father figure and he wouldn't ever touch Asuka. I wonder if that's damage control. Because fans in Japan have been infuriated over that whole thing coming out of nowhere. The fully revealed promo poster by Khara also has Kensuke standing literally on the opposite end, far away from Asuka. I posted here about people throwing away their Asuka merch a few days ago. Recently saw someone complaining about their pamphlet selling for 30 yen whereas the ones from the previous installments went for 1-2k yen during their release.

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Mar 21, 2021 2:26 am I think it's both. In her interview she only considers it as an implication, too. FelipeFritschF wrote: Okay. Miyamura: To me she's like a daughter, so my reaction was "Kensuke you bastard, when did you...!" (laugh) I was suprised, with no lead in she was intimate with Kensuke! For example, when Asuka is heading that way Kensuke takes up her (?)takes a picture of her(?) [撮る]. "Wait a sec, what the hell is this scene" - I wanted to insert a tsukkomi line. Asuka also enters his room on her own accord to play games.

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Mar 21, 2021 7:25 pm Mr. M wrote: Some days ago I've seen an interview to the seiyuu of Asuka were she wasn't that happy with the character's choices in 3.0+1.0 been posted here in the spoiler thread,bit I lost it. Can someone help me and post it here?

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 22, 2021 2:14 am Well she also said "insinuated" so it's more like she personally doesn't like it. Though it seems like an obvious example of 'deliberately up for interpretation' - the possibility is suggested though not 100% confirmed. If there was going to be a mini Asuka with a parent, this would imply that the final scene really does (or at least, at some point, was considered) to take place in some kind of AU/rewritten universe (*groans* pls no) Though it seems to be a failure of imagination here. If that's a different universe where their relation was different from the get-go I don't really see any loli implications - especially since they were not even going to show the guy's face. Also you'd think ethics would be a greater concern than marketability lol. All that would really be said is "Since she's not a clone here she has parents n stuff" I'm glad they ultimately showed her about the same age as the others but mostly cause I hate the AU/hard reset idea & 'cause it would seem unfair if she alone didn't get seen properly reaching adulthood, freedom & independence. But I wouldn't take this as indicative till I've seen the CR cause for all I know the last scene went through as much rewriting and wriggling as the epilogue for EoE. For all we know there was a version where all the artificial children were seen with parents, like Rei with Touji & Hikari or something. I mean if she was still at her old age mentally wouldn't suddenly being transformed into a nearly 30 year old be a horrible thing? Like skipping most of her prime really? In that case the happy ending would probably be to just turn her back human & let her grow up normally in both mind & body. The bit where her suit is popping at the seams is happy precisely cause she looks like she feels now. The suit coming off is like a false veil coming off; I do love from the screenshot how they have the interface clips falling off which were always a symbol of how much she'd built her role as a pilot into her identity. I mean throughout the film she acts all serious, first pissed at Shinji for acting like a child & then later forgiving him from that more mature perspective ("He needs a caretaker") & she's clearly distressed about the whole unwilling transformation (though there are other awful aspects to it besides not maturing) EDIT: By "the last scene" is Asuka even talking about a different version of the epilogue (where she says she didn't see Asuka/ wasn't aware of till later since she has no line) or the last VOICED scene where we see Kensuke with child Asuka? It's her inner child that's like basic psychology, Same as the "Shinji & Kaworu holding hands as kids" one. like the small innocent part of her that never got its needs met back then getting positive attention now. It's kinda common for people to want/ look for the good stuff they never got as kids in their romantic relationships, though of course it doesn't need to be romantic, a friend or mentor can give you that, too. But I wouldn't go from that one visual alone to say they can't e a couple & or much less has "loli implications", the child Asuka here is half a memory & half a metaphor for her emotional state. It's just like when we got that shot of her crying for attention as a baby in the old series as an illustration of where the feeling was coming from. In the OG timeline she sort of got this from Kyoko when they were reunited but it was brief thing & not everyone has the option of having their parents come back & apologize (such Rebuild Asuka, who never had parents) Everyone can see that that's an obvious metaphor for getting your emotional needs met, right? Regardless of wether or not they're an item.

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Pluto » Mon Mar 22, 2021 4:02 am I just want to give an update that I'll probably get to the interview with Miyamura in the theatrical pamphlet in a few days. I'm almost done with the Megumi Ogata interview and it's really long. I didn't expect this topic to be about the Asuka x Kensuke thing but it's explicit in the film that they're not together. That's a big part in Asuka's arc about 1. not being human and 2. not having a parental figure. I even asked Japanese people who watched the movie with me and no one even came to that conclusion at all. If you'd like to read my thoughts about it they're in the first post of the 3.0+1.0 reactions thread.

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 22, 2021 5:14 am its not like i rly care either way. I'll judge when I see it but it's wholly possible that some of the first revewers just overextrapolated from her walking around in naked etc. Though I saw one screenshot where she actually had underpants on, so like, my siblings have definitely seen me in pyjamas XDD Anyways thanks for putting in the work to bless us all the translations. (if your posting them all it would probably be best to have an extra topic for them) I'm interested in the Sakamoto one just for a chance to maybe find out wtf is supposed to be up there.

[]: Re: Miyamura Interview?             Quote Post by Xenoblade » Mon Mar 22, 2021 2:39 pm Pluto wrote: I didn't expect this topic to be about the Asuka x Kensuke thing but it's explicit in the film that they're not together. That's a big part in Asuka's arc about 1. not being human and 2. not having a parental figure. I even asked Japanese people who watched the movie with me and no one even came to that conclusion at all. If you'd like to read my thoughts about it they're in the first post of the 3.0+1.0 reactions thread.
